hero.headline:
23 Years of Engineering Perfect
Pools in Raleigh
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves more than a guy with a net. Pool Specialists brings 23 years of CPO-certified expertise and engineering precision to every backyard in the Triangle. We handle the chemistry, the equipment, and the headaches so you just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> the Triangle's Top Technicians
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to complex equipment repairs, our CPO-certified team has the expertise and manufacturer-authorized training to keep your pool in peak condition year-round.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly and monthly maintenance including chemical monitoring, water balance management, skimming, and filter cleaning. Your pool stays sparkling, safe, and swim-ready all season.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. As Pentair's primary warranty station and Zodiac/Jandy authorized, we fix it right the first time.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Precision measurement, pattern selection, and professional installation of vinyl pool liners. Restore your pool's appearance and stop leaks before they become costly problems.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Comprehensive inspections for buyers, sellers, and property owners. We assess equipment condition, structural integrity, and safety compliance so you know exactly what you're getting.

cards.title: Safety Covers & Winterization
cards.description: Professional safety cover installation and seasonal opening/closing services. Protect your pool through North Carolina winters and your family year-round.

cards.title: CPO Certification Classes
cards.description: NSPF-certified instructor-led Certified Pool Operator courses for industry professionals and property managers. Get the credentials that set you apart.

steps.title: Book Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call or fill out the form. We'll schedule a thorough inspection of your pool, equipment, and water chemistry at no cost. No sales pressure, just honest answers.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: Our CPO-certified technicians assess your pool's needs and recommend a service plan tailored to your pool type, usage, and budget. Transparent pricing, no hidden fees.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: We handle everything from chemical balancing to equipment maintenance. You'll get service reports after every visit and a pool that's always ready for a swim.

about.label: Why Raleigh Trusts Pool Specialists
about.headline: Engineer-Founded. Family-Owned. Precision-Driven.
about.description: Founded in 2003 by Craig Wooster, a former competitive swimmer and engineer with a Masters in Computer and Electrical Engineering, Pool Specialists was built on the belief that pool care should be precise, reliable, and personal. Over 23 years, we've grown from a one-man operation to the most technologically advanced pool contractor in the Raleigh-Durham-Chapel Hill area, serving 1,000+ families while staying true to our family-owned roots. Every technician on our team holds a CPO certification because we believe your pool deserves nothing less.

features.title: Manufacturer-Authorized Warranty Service
features.description: We're the primary warranty station for Pentair and authorized for Zodiac, Jandy, and Polaris. Your equipment is in factory-trained hands.

features.title: Engineering Precision, Every Visit
features.description: Our founder's engineering background means we approach every pool systematically. No guesswork, just data-driven care that extends the life of your pool.

features.title: BBB A+ Rated Since 2003
features.description: Two decades of consistent excellence. Our A+ BBB rating and 114+ Google reviews reflect a commitment to doing right by every customer.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Tell us about yours and we'll provide an honest quote within 24 hours.

guarantee.headline: Our "Perfect Pool" Promise
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we'll come back to make it right at no additional charge. With 23 years of reputation on the line, we stand behind every visit. Your satisfaction isn't just a policy; it's our pride.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within one week. For urgent issues like equipment failures or green pools, we offer priority same-day or next-day response. Call us at 919-847-4117 and we'll get you on the schedule fast.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Every single technician on our team holds a Certified Pool Operator (CPO) license from the NSPF. We're also a Pentair primary warranty station and authorized for Zodiac/Jandy/Polaris, meaning our team has factory-level training on major pool equipment brands.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools and HOAs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We maintain pools for swim clubs, community pools, HOAs, and commercial properties across the Triangle. Our team includes NSPF CPO Instructors who understand the higher regulatory requirements for commercial aquatic facilities.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Raleigh, Durham, Cary, Apex, Chapel Hill, Carrboro, Pittsboro, Knightdale, Garner, Wake Forest, Youngsville, Oxford, Lake Gaston, and surrounding areas throughout the Triangle region.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool inspections for home purchases?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our comprehensive pool inspections assess equipment condition, structural integrity, safety compliance, and remaining useful life of all components. We provide a detailed written report that gives buyers and sellers complete transparency.

testimonials.name: Local Homeowner
testimonials.text: We were very pleased when we found Pool Specialists. They have been very responsive, very fair, and just done a great job. I would highly recommend them to anyone looking for reliable pool care in Raleigh.

testimonials.name: Wood Valley Swim Club Member
testimonials.text: Pool Specialists maintain the salt water pool at Wood Valley Swim and Racquet where I swim year round. The water is always very clean and pleasant to swim laps in. Highly recommended for anyone needing commercial pool care.

testimonials.name: Community Pool Board Member
testimonials.text: Pool Specialists does an amazing job maintaining our community pool. Craig and his team are professional and meticulous in keeping the pool and equipment in top shape. Their CPO expertise makes all the difference.
